title: plectritis congesta var. major
intro: Plectritis congesta var. major, commonly known as Pacific blue-eyed Mary, is a perennial herb belonging to the phlox family (Polemoniaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Plectritis congesta var. major include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin irritations and wounds.
